title: AMEN .amen Context Export (v0.1)
description: Portable, signed, human-first context profile. Imports the PERSON (durable facets about who someone is), never their CONTENT (messages, posts, media, contacts). See CONTRACTS.md §8. The exclusion guarantee is structural: this schema forbids any property that could carry message bodies, post text, media URLs, emails, phone numbers, or contact arrays. A facet whose value is an email/phone/URL/contact is additionally rejected by the unit-tested exclusion validator (some content shapes can hide inside a free-text `value`, which a JSON Schema alone cannot catch — see `additionalNotes`).

$schema.description: URI of this schema. Identifies the .amen format + version to importers.

version.description: Semantic version of the .amen format this file conforms to.

exportedAt.description: ISO-8601 / RFC-3339 timestamp the export was produced.

issuer.description: The platform that produced and signed this file.

subject.description: The person this context describes. Display identity only — no contact handles for messaging, no email, no phone.

handle.description: Public @handle. Not an email or phone number; the pattern forbids '@domain' email shapes and '+' phone shapes.

facets.description: Durable facets about the person. EXPORT RULE: only facets with visibility 'public' (or explicitly checked at export time) are included. Tier-P facets (relationships, family, health, faith areas-needing-support) are never exportable.

signature.description: Detached Ed25519 signature over the canonicalized file (minus this object).

alg.description: Signature algorithm. Only Ed25519 is valid in v0.1.

keyId.description: Identifier of the issuer key used to sign; resolves to a published public key.

value.description: Base64 (standard or URL-safe) encoded Ed25519 signature.

category.description: Facet category. Tier-P categories (relationships, family, health) appear here ONLY if their value is non-content and the exporter included them as public — by contract they are not server-readable and normally excluded.

key.description: Machine key, e.g. 'interest.ai', 'goal.launch_app'. Lowercase dotted/underscored tokens only — cannot encode an email or URL.

value.description: The facet value. One of: a plain text string, or a list of short strings. Structured faith/communication/relationship values are flattened to text/list on export. Free text is length-capped; the exclusion validator additionally rejects values that match email/phone/URL/@mention-array shapes.

oneOf.description: List value, e.g. favorite books, skills.

visibility.description: Sharing scope. Constrained to the 5 canonical values. Exports are produced from 'public' (and explicitly-checked) facets.
